description: Create test/Router.t.sol covering Router.swap() happy paths and all quote/integrity validation reverts from the Error Handling table. Scope: ERC20->ERC20 happy path, ERC20->NATIVE_ETH_SENTINEL happy path, NATIVE_ETH_SENTINEL->ERC20 happy path, each of the Zero/Invalid/Self-swap revert cases, ETHValueMismatch revert, ExecutorNotSet revert, executor two-step registry (setPendingExecutor + acceptExecutor) swap behavior. Fee math is intentionally trivial (zero fees) in this file so it isolates the core swap pipeline. Fee-specific assertions live in INF-0008.
commit: test(router): add single-swap happy path and integrity reverts
steps: Create test/Router.t.sol with setUp() that deploys: refactored pure-VM ExecutionProxy, Router(owner=address(this), liquidator=makeAddr('liquidator')), calls router.setPendingExecutor(address(executor)) + router.acceptExecutor(), deploys MockERC20 tokens A/B/C, MockWETH (reuse helpers from test/ExecutionProxy.t.sol by promoting MockERC20/MockWETH into test/helpers/MockERC20.sol -- or duplicate minimally at the top of this test). Grant user 100 ether.

Add test_SwapERC20ToERC20 asserting: user approves router, calls swap(SwapParams{inputToken=A,inputAmount=1000e18,outputToken=B,outputQuote=900e18,outputMin=800e18,recipient=receiver,...,weirollCommands+state = MockDEX swap}); receiver.balanceOf(B) within [outputMin, outputQuote]; router.balanceOf(A)==0; router.balanceOf(B)==0 when amountOut == outputQuote exactly; Swap event emitted with correct fields.

Add test_SwapNativeETHIn calling swap{value:1 ether}(...) with inputToken=NATIVE_ETH_SENTINEL; verify receiver token balance and router.balance==0. Add test_SwapNativeETHOut with outputToken=NATIVE_ETH_SENTINEL; verify receiver.balance delta and router.balance==0. Reuse ExecutionProxy test's `_buildMintProgram`-style helper adapted for Router forwarding.

Add revert tests for each validation case: test_Revert_ZeroInputAmount, test_Revert_ZeroOutputQuote, test_Revert_ZeroOutputMin, test_Revert_InvalidSlippageBounds (outputMin > outputQuote), test_Revert_SelfSwap (inputToken == outputToken), test_Revert_ETHValueMismatch_NativeIn (msg.value != inputAmount), test_Revert_ETHValueMismatch_ERC20In (msg.value != 0 with ERC20 input), test_Revert_ExecutorNotSet (no acceptExecutor called), test_Revert_Paused (expects Router.Paused selector from the overridden Pausable hook). Use `vm.expectRevert` with the exact error selector.

Add test_Revert_ExecutorBubblesUp_PreservesApproval: deploy a mock executor whose executePath() reverts with `RevertingExecutor.Boom()`; give the user 1000e18 of inputToken and an infinite approval to the Router; call swap; assert the swap reverts with Boom.selector (no silent catch), assert inputToken.balanceOf(user) == 1000e18 (no tokens lost), assert inputToken.allowance(user, router) is unchanged, and assert router and executor hold zero of both tokens (atomic rollback).

Add test_ExecutorRegistry_TwoStep verifying: setPendingExecutor(newExec) does not change executor; acceptExecutor() updates it; swap executes against the new address; non-owner cannot call setPendingExecutor; acceptExecutor reverts when pendingExecutor is address(0).
Run `forge test --match-contract RouterTest -vvv` and ensure all tests pass.
acceptance_criteria: [auto] File test/Router.t.sol exists; `forge test --match-path test/Router.t.sol` passes.

[auto] grep -n 'Router.SlippageExceeded.selector\|Router.ZeroInputAmount.selector\|Router.ZeroOutputQuote.selector\|Router.SelfSwap.selector\|Router.InvalidSlippageBounds.selector\|Router.ETHValueMismatch.selector\|Router.ExecutorNotSet.selector' test/Router.t.sol returns at least 6 matches.
[auto] test_SwapERC20ToERC20 asserts on at least 4 post-conditions (receiver balance, router balance, event emission via vm.expectEmit, return value).
[auto] test_ExecutorRegistry_TwoStep exercises at least 4 state transitions (initial zero, pending set, accept, subsequent swap).
[auto] `forge test --match-path test/Router.t.sol -v` shows zero failing and zero skipped tests.

[manual] Swap event assertion uses vm.expectEmit(true, false, false, true) (checkTopic1 + checkData both true) so the indexed sender and all 9 non-indexed data fields are value-compared against the expected event.
implementation_notes: Added test/Router.t.sol with 14 tests: 3 happy paths (ERC20<->ERC20, native-in, native-out) using Weiroll programs against MockDEX and a new MockETHSender test sink, 9 integrity/validation reverts matching the Error Handling table, executor-revert-bubble with atomic-rollback invariants (balance, allowance, router/executor state) via a local RevertingExecutor, and a four-transition executor registry test (initial/pending-set/accept/subsequent swap). Swap-event assertions use vm.expectEmit(true,false,false,true). Had to refactor src/Router.sol to move the 18 file-scope errors inside the Router contract so tests can reference them as `Router.ErrorName.selector` per the task's grep criterion; Paused stays in RouterErrors library to avoid OZ event/error identifier collision. forge test passes 29/29 (14 Router + 10 ExecutionProxy + 5 helpers). Commit c0964a5.
